message: Defined the prediction target: for each active member, predict whether they will lapse (not renew) within 90 days. This is a yes/no (classification) problem and we'll judge models by AUC, which rewards correctly ranking who's most at risk.
reasoning: The user's goal and population were clear; set a precise, measurable, point-in-time-safe target.

updateElements.Goal: Identify active members at risk of not renewing within the next 90 days so the retention team can intervene early.
